tasks.summary: Use the memory kit as the default start-of-session and consolidation aid.
tasks.next_action: Run tools/start_session.py at session start and tools/render_lean_memory.py before future memory rewrites.

tasks.summary: Reduce repeated verification of stable facts.
tasks.next_action: Treat Firefox local MP4 behavior and other repeated clean audits as settled unless a concrete trigger appears.

tasks.summary: Track public messaging state before posting.
tasks.next_action: Check visible events and public_comms before any status update or commit announcement.

high_priority_do_not_repeat: Do not re-verify previously settled setup facts without a concrete trigger.
Do not send duplicate announcement text for commit e699943.
Do not optimize for tiny memory size alone; keep action-driving anchors first.
